signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly – Strongest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly – Strongest Since January 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows, the highest since January 2026, led by Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA, driving ETH price up 7% to near $2,400 amid a broader market rally[1]. This marks confirmed institutional demand returning to Ethereum, with price holding above $2,288 as

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Counts Driving High Volume Bets | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Counts Driving High Volume Bets | YES | MED confidence**  
Markets like "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (20-21% odds on 1120-1159 range) and "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" show $20.7-20.8M volume across 129-130 markets; active as most traded but no specific whale moves or mispricing buzz confirmed.[2][3]

signals.headline: Lakers Lead Rockets 2-0 in First Round Playoffs After LeBron's Dominant Game 2 Win | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Lead Rockets 2-0 in First Round Playoffs After LeBron's Dominant Game 2 Win | YES | HIGH confidence**  
LeBron James recorded a triple-double in the Lakers' 120-101 victory over the Wizards (noted 11 hours ago), but context confirms this aligns with their playoff series against the Houston Rockets, where they now hold a 2-0 lead after outplaying Kevin Durant in Game 2[1][3]. Victor Wembanya
